/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/FileMoveTests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/FileMoveTests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMoveTests.dir/src/cli_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMoveTests.dir/src/storage_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMoveTests.dir/src/clipboard_handler.cpp.o -o FileMoveTests  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
